Name: Cutting Words
Description: The galliard's way with words takes a sinister turn as their conversation directs spirits of painful memories and confusion to assault the mind of their target. The resulting mental anguish causes the victim to visibly bleed from their nose, ears, and eyes as they struggle to hold a coherent conversation. This Gift is taught by spirits of sickness and disease.
System:
The Garou must be involved in direct conversation with the target before making a Gift test against the target's Composure + Intelligence. If successful, the victim suffers Impairment on Social and Mental pools for a number of turns equal to the margin. The blood loss looks dramatic and will attract unwarranted attention in the wrong environment but only causes damage on a Brutal result-in these instances, the victim also suffers a level of Superficial Health damage.
 The conversation itself isn't noticeably malicious, but those observing with supernatural perception can detect something is amiss (use the successes rolled as the Difficulty to detect the Gift's usage).
Duration: One turn per point of margin
